column2: Allows you to fire the selected weapon twice in one turn.
Can teleport to the point where object of teleport item is fell.
Same as Dual item but fire both shot 1 and shot 2 in one turn.
Use 8% of your total energy to give 33% additional damage to your shot for one turn.
Heals 15% of your total energy and life forms (bio) have additional 5%
Heals 25% of your total energy and life forms (bio) have additional 5%
Change position with team member who has the least energy. If you have least energy, this item does NOT function.
Adds 33% damage to your shot for one turn.
Creates lightning effect to your shot for one turn.
Adds 25% more bunge power to your shot for one turn.
버젼은 1슬롯 아이템 99번이며, 딜레이에 버젼이 들어와야 합니다.
